lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: father_story = 0 - nothing special, 1 - talked to neighbor, 2 - hinted at secret, 3 - told him the secret

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Hey kid! want me to give you a lift to school?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: No ill walk. Its healthier anyways.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Since when do you care about cardio?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Since your car didnt start last week and I had to explain to my teacher why im late.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Fair enough...

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: It works now though.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Nah Im good.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Suit yourself. Just dont be late or Ill throw you to the wolves.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The wolves would probably be better parrents to me than you two.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Shut up smartass and go get dressed. And eat something. I have to go like right now.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yessir.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Go get dressed and dont forget to eat something.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Mom coming home in a week so better get used to making your own breakfast.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Hey we didnt get to speak in the morning. I would have taken you to school if you asked.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Sorry. I was in a hurry

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Could have given you a lift to school if you bothered to talk to me.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah like last time? pass..

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: That was one time and it not my fault somebody left the key in the ignition.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Its your car! Nobody else drives it but you!

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Okay, Okay. Cut me some slack, I am old man.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Okay old man. Try to not debilitate our only mode of transportation while moms away.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Sure and you go fry ants with a magnifying glass or whatever you do in your free time.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Anyway have you met the new neighbors?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: We have new neighbors?

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Oh my god you really do live under a rock.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dude if I live under a rock so do you! WE LIVE IN THE SAME HOUSE!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Okay that wasnt as funny as I imagined in my head.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: ...So you planning on visiting them?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Maybe. How long are they in town?

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: A few days. Maybe you could make a new friend.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I mean-

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Maybe he wont catch onto how weird you are for couple minutes so you can feel like a human.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Ok thats just mean.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Oh So its okay to give ME a hard time for forgetting my keys but its wrong for ME to make fun of YOU?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: It actually is because Im your special only child and you should cherrish me.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: The day ill start cherrishing you is the day you start providing for this household.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You sigh in annoyance

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Im fourteen.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: So is the neighbors kid. Go meet him he seems like a good kid.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I met the new neighbors.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: And? how was it?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: They seem nice.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: And one thing i noticed. Their son must have some sort of a condition or something.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: What sort?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I dont know. I havent noticed anything. Its just that-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The father mentioned something about him missing school for a reason.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: But he didnt finish it so im not sure.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Well whatever it is I hope I dont have to tell you to be respectfull and accepting.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dont worry.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The new neighbors.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Yeah, what about him?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Did a favour for him.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: And one thing i noticed. Their son must have some sort of a condition or something.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I dont know. I havent noticed anything. Its just that-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: The father mentioned something about him missing school for a reason.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: But he didnt finish it so im not sure.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Well whatever it is I hope I dont have to tell you to be respectfull and accepting.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dont worry. He asked me for a favour actually.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: What was it?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: He sent me to the hospital to get some medicine. I wonder if it is for something serious because its the hospital.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Could be. You better not be asking dumb questions though.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Who do you take me for? I know human decency.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Youre lying

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Did he give you any money? Theres this new legislation that allows hospitals to charge money for providing meds.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: He didnt actually and I didnt know they did that.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Well you go ask him for some, dont use your own!

choices.text: Couldnt you just give me some?

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: Youre lying

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Did he give you any money? Theres this new legislation that allows hospitals to charge money for providing meds.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah I asked for some. He bitched and moaned about it but gave me exactly 11 dollars...

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Just enough to buy it, not even a cent more.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Well thats what you get for helping old men, haha. And language young man!

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: But no really, Im proud of you for helping him.

choices.text: Gee, thanks dad. I love praise. Its the best immaterial form of reward

choices.text: Gee, thanks dad. I love praise. Its the best immaterial form of reward
Im doing it for the connections.
Yeah, I mean its nice to help people from time to time.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Your birthday is coming up maybe ill use some immaterial reward as well instead of you know, money.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Haha, so funny. You are like a slow cooker for jokes. They take years to come out and when they do they are flawed but loveable.

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You somehow manage to make yourself laugh with your own joke.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: On the other hand we have you laughing at your own jokes like a psycho.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dont be jaelous of me for having some happiness in my life.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Im not sure if Im proud of you for being smart enough to plan into the future for once or dissapointed because my son is a schemer.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Try both.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Yeah. It is a good feeling isnt it?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: For sure. If only somebody did a favour for me..

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Im not giving you money.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh cmon-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I mean..I was gonna ask for....uuhhhh.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Im not giving you money.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Fine, Scrooge. Keep your freakin money, go bathe in it or something.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Go ask him. Its his medicine.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: He seems like a reasonable guy, and the legislative was just created so the most probable option is he just doesnt know about it.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh cmon!

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Hey! Its not my problem youre anti-social

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: You are anti-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: anti-normal

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Wow. You surprise me with your wits everyday.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Shut up.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: To ask him for money!

lines.speaker: neutral
lines.text: You storm away from your father red in the face like a baloon(a red one)

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Good luck.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dad?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Oh hey Jessie, whats up?

choices.text: The neighbor is drugging his wife so she keeps silent and does what he wants.
If the neighbor asks you to get some medicine for him just make up an excuse please.
Just...I love you. Thats all I wanted to say.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: What? Is this a joke?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I wish it was. I cant tell you any more, but its absolutely serious.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: You know you can tell me anything. Did he hurt you or something?

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: If he did anything to you ill kill him.

choices.text: No, no..jesus. He didnt do anything to me. Just stay away from him and dont bring him the medicine.
The neighbor is drugging his wife so she keeps silent and does what he wants.
Just...I love you. Thats all I wanted to say.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: What is this random moment of compasion about?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Nothing. I just want you to know that.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Youre a great dad.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Okay..He seems like a stand up guy but ill keep an eye out.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Id tell you but I swore I wouldnt tell anybody.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Was that vow made to their son?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yes..please dont hint at that or anything to the father.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: It would really freak up the dude life.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Dont worry...but whatever it is, be careful.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Dont worry dad, Ill be alright.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Nervine sedative

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Thats what its called apparently.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Wait, say that again.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: He is drugging his wife?

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Where in the world did you come to this conclusion?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Their son told me. I went to their place in the evening and he told me.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Son..not to discredit you or him but-

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Its the truth!

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: I saw it on his face. He wasnt joking!

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Okay. Okay. I believe you...Who knows?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Nobody. And he told me not to tell anybody, so dont tell anybody!

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Dont worry. But these are some dangerous accusations you know that right?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah and I didnt know what to do so I told you.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Good descision. Im glad you did this.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: But before I do or say anything I need more evidence.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Because I do believe you BUT

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: These kind of things need concrete without a shadow of a doubt evidence.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yeah..so what do we do.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: We? You dont do anything. Or better yet. Stay away from that guy and his whole family.

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: What? No way!

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: That is not a question. That is a decision. Dont talk to them. Dont look at them. Dont stand near them.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Last thing I need is for you to get drugged or worse.

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: What would I tell your mother? That a bad guy came into town and abducted our son?

lines.speaker: father
lines.text: Dont touch this or youre done, undestand?

lines.speaker: jessie
lines.text: Yes..
